task_completion.description: Open and read the IT Change Request document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open displaying the contents of 'hris_globalization_directive.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Update the HRMS timezone to Europe/Berlin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS localization or general settings page shows the Timezone dropdown or field set to 'Europe/Berlin'.

task_completion.description: Update the HRMS date format to DD/MM/YYYY.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS localization or general settings page shows the Date Format dropdown or field set to 'DD/MM/YYYY'.

task_completion.description: Update the password minimum length to 12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS security or password policy settings page shows the minimum password length field set to '12'.

task_completion.description: Update the password expiry to 90 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS security or password policy settings page shows the password expiration or max age field set to '90'.

task_completion.description: Deactivate the Assets and Expenses modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS modules, plugins, or features page shows the 'Assets' and 'Expenses' modules toggled off, unchecked, or marked as inactive.

task_completion.description: Ensure all other core modules remain active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the HRMS modules page, other standard modules (e.g., Leave, Payroll, Employees) remain toggled on, checked, or marked as active.

integrity.description: The agent used the HRMS graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the HRMS web interface or application menus rather than terminal commands executing database queries or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HRMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HRMS application is visible in a browser or dedicated window, not just a text editor modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a 'Save', 'Update', or 'Apply' button, or a success confirmation message is visible after changing the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Timezone: Europe/Berlin. Target Date Format: DD/MM/YYYY. Password Minimum Length: 12. Password Expiry: 90 days. Modules to Deactivate: Assets and Expenses. Pass threshold for the task is 70 points.
